City Park Gaming and Brew Room


Daily Beer Specials


Club Tuesdays

Free tastings, free snacks, 20% off for Members. Brewer and Select can specials

Open Mic Wednesdays

$3 Pony Boi and Old Oriole Park 10% off for Performers

Thursdays

$5 Drafts until 5:00pm or 7:00pm for Beer Club Members

Fridays

$5 Beers from Brewer of the Day. Ask Beertender

Sour Saturdays

$6 Sours

Trivia Sundays

$1 off beer for Trivia players from 4:00pm-6:00pm

Located at 133 East Main Street, Westminster, Maryland, 21157, Suite 1.

Call Us at 443-201-9570 and follow or join us on Facebook, Instagram, or Discord for news on upcoming events or releases!

Hours of Operation:
Monday - Closed
Tuesday - 2:00pm to 7:00pm
Wednesday - 2:00pm to 10:00pm
Thursday - 2:00pm to 10:00pm
Friday - 12:00pm to 10:00pm
Saturday - 12:00pm to 10:00pm
Sunday - 12:00pm to 7:00pm
